Uses of Class
neqsim.process.processmodel.ProcessModel

Packages that use ProcessModel
Package
Description
neqsim.mcp.model
Typed model classes for NeqSim MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration.
neqsim.mcp.runners
 
neqsim.process.automation
Stable automation API for programmatic interaction with running NeqSim process simulations.
neqsim.process.equipment.iec81346
IEC 81346 reference designation support for NeqSim process equipment.
neqsim.process.processmodel
 
neqsim.process.processmodel.lifecycle
Lifecycle management for ProcessSystem models (Digital Twins).
neqsim.process.util.optimizer
Process optimization engine and constraint evaluation utilities.
neqsim.process.util.report

    Evaluates the constraint value.
    double

    Evaluates the objective using minimizer sign convention.
    double
    ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.ObjectiveDefinition.evaluateRaw(ProcessModel model)
    Evaluates the objective without sign adjustment.

    ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.findActiveBottleneck(ProcessModel model)
    Finds the active bottleneck across all process areas.

    ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.getConstraintMarginVector(ProcessModel model)
    Evaluates all constraints and returns the margin vector for external solvers.

    ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.ConstraintDefinition.isSatisfied(ProcessModel model)
    Checks whether the constraint is satisfied.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
